# CodeExecutor

> Executes Python code snippets in a sandboxed subprocess. Blocks dangerous imports (os, sys, subprocess, socket, etc.). Only Python is supported.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | execution |
| Requires network | no |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| code | string | yes | - | Python code to execute |
| timeout | integer | no | 30 | Execution timeout in seconds (default: 30) |
| language | string | no | python | Programming language (only 'python' supported) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "CodeExecutor"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
